TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O pisitapang no micalapay sifo no Dipong mifalic to kacingangan no Taywan tamdaw == I 1940 miheca 2 folad 11 romi'ad kailisinan no Dipong itiya romi'ad, Taywan sotokufu o sapilaheciaw to pahecian to "palekapot a pisatao'", patodong sa i 2 folad 11 roi'ad i "Sinmu tenno" patirengan a romi'ad, pacering mihayda to pifalic kacingangan to no Dipong a ngangan no Taywan a tamdaw, patodong to sakanga'ay no Taywan tamdaw ato Dipong tamdaw malalenay ko sakaira, nika so'alinen ko nidemakan caay aca ka matira. ​Pifalic to kacingangan o "Teikoku-ka (palafinawlan)" (1937-1945) a tadamanay salongan, o sakafiyol tangasa anini romi'ad. O ngangan no miso caay ko tadangangan I picalap no Dipong to Taywan ira ko masasiromaay a palekapot a pisatao', tinako to Hondo kakuco suki (1919-1937 mihecaan), pako pinayaran to nengneng no Dipong to Taywan, sakaecaaw ka pisetek no finacadan to nicalapan a sera sanay. ​I 1937 miheca maledef no Dipong micalap ko Congko itiya, oya micaapay a Dipong sifo o mamilaheci mipalekapot a pisatao' to Taywan a tamdaw, saka laloma'anto ato papotalayto maemin a "mala o Dipong a tamdaw", oya citodongay micikeroh to "Teikoku-ka (palafinawlan)" a pisatao'. ​​O laloma'an no pisatao' halo pitena' to kiki no Taywan, mifo'ot pasowal to sowal no niyah, paterep to niyah sowal a pahoso (laciw), micikeroh mifalic to kacingangan, patangic papita'ong to cincia , mifo'ot mikihatiya to pafilongan. ​​​Satadamaanay, i "pifalic to kacingangan" a onto, patodong salongan pipalekapot a satao' a demak, oya piteikoku-ka (palafinawlan) a pahapinangan. I 1940 miheca 2 folad 11 romi'ad, o kailisinan no Dipong itiya romi'ad, Taywan sotokufu mihapiw to pisalof to kacingangan no kika, miteka tala'ayaw mifalic to kacingangan a satao', nanoyaan miteka to ko Taywan tamdaw "mifalic to ngangan" a onto itiya. ​​​​Nika sa'ayaw caay ko rahodayay a pidemak to pifalic to kacingangan, pifalic to ngangan masa'edemen ko pitomadaw, orasaka awaay ko mangalayay mifalic to kacinganganaw a tamdaw; saka "mipanono'ay" ko micalapay sifo no Dipong, saka ngalay no Taywan tamdaw misawad to ngangan no niyah, mitakec to "Kotei no coai" sanay. ​​​​​Malalifet ko lalood no Dipong ato Congko itiya, kacango'otan ko kalodafodafong, o micalapay a sifo mihapiw itiya: "O mangalayay mifalic to kacingangan a tamdaw i, maparocek mapatongal ko kasoy, felac odah a kakaenen." dengan o kicay no Dipong ko sapisolot, o wawa manga'ay micomod to pitilidan no Dipong a mikiwiko a "kanga'ayan", o sakanga'ay no 'alomanay mipili' mifalic to sakacingangan. Pala o Kotei a finawlan ​Malalifet malalood ko i kalaloodan itiya, mikihatiya ko sofitay no Amilika i, mato caay to kaedeng ko sofitay no Dipong a sifo; I 1943 miheca, o sotokufu no Taywan misadadahal to kalifotan pifalic to kacingangan, milongoc to finawlan no Taywan kao ciiraay to "mangadoay to Kotei a harateng" sato. ​​Nanoya, o pisatao' nano o mipanono'ay mafalic o nipatangican to. Tinako: oya mitiliday a sito oya cinganganay to no Dipong a ngangan ta manga'ay mitilid, to romi'ami'ad o ngangan no Dipong ka pitahidang, malatapangay a komoyin no Taywan, ko citodongay mieses patomadaway, maemin a mafalic ko kacingangan. ​​​Matini ko picering i, nika ira to ko miliyangay tamdaw, itira i pifades to miliyangay ato midoedoay, mipili' to caayay kalecad a lalan; oya Dipong a ngangan ato no niyah lakakawa a to'asan palekapot hananay to, mangalef tastas han to ngangan malafa'elohay ngangan no niyah. ​​​​Tinako: Huang falic han pala "Hirota Toka" ano eca "Yokoyama Toka" han, Lu falic han pala "Miyasita" han to, rama sato midotoc to niyah tato'asan a ngangan, tinako o Cai falicen pala "Watayo", o Wu falicen pala "Enryo" han to. ​​​​​Ono yincumin i, dengan o pilayap to nipadamsoan no Dipong a sifo ko sakacingangan, awaay ko niyah todong a mipili' to sakacingangan. Ikor no Dipong a micalap, mitiya to ko picalap no Komintang ​Ikor i mamoko'ay mihecaan, mapidah ko Dipong i kalalood no Taypinyang, tangsol sa "macalap macefis" no Conghuaminko sifo ko Taywan, nanoya o kacingangan no Taywan a tamdaw mafalic pala no Han a tilid. ​​Ngengengen matiya o patikoay to no Han a kacingangan, halo ngangan no lalan saheto ono kowaping ko pangangan no komintang, matiya to o picalap no Dipong. Oya mi'ingtelay to Dipong ko komintang a sifo, saki Pala o Kotei to finawlan wata ko nikalatiih to Taywan a tamdaw, misiiked to Taywan tadaw ato kowaping a tamdaw, dengan o palisafa kalakomoing to Taywan tamdaw. ​​​Ano saki yincumin a nengneng, o fa'elohay micalapay k sakowan no komintang saan, caay piharateng to faloco' no yincumin, pakinali patangic to kacingangan ano eca o awaayay ko kacitodongan no to'as ko pipakafit to ngangan. ​​​​Masamatira wataay to ko kaepec to ponka no Taywan finacadan picalap patangic no papotalay ponka, mikorac ko "no niyahan", nanoyaan sa malasawad ko noniyah lamit no ponka no Taywan a tamdaw. ​​​​​I'ayaw no nipatatekoan no Taywan i, o pipatangic sakowan no komintang papilayap to Taywan a tamdaw to mangahay a Congko, miepecay to kacitodong no Taywan, saka masasifod to herateng no niyah to paretatenga to niyah ko Taywan a tamdaw. ​​​​​​Anini sato, itiniay i caayay ko matatodongay kitakit ko ka'orip no Taywan a tamdaw, o nianan ko sasa'icelen pakayni i kacingangan, misalof pahapinang miketon o cima ko niyah ahan. ​​​​​​Padamsoay: Sin taiwan heping kikingkay a cuanyien
S.PHON: == o~u pisitapaŋ no~u miʦaɾapaj sifo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ mifaɾiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan no~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw == i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ kaiɾisinan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ itija ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tajwan so~uto~uko~u~ufo~u~u o~u sapiɾaħəʦiaw to~u paħəʦian to~u "paɾəkapo~ut a pisatao~uʡ", pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ sa i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~uiʡaɬ~ɮ i "sinmo~u~u tənno~u" patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, paʦəriŋ miħajɬ~ɮa to~u pifaɾiʦ kaʦiŋaŋan to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ŋaŋan no~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw, pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u sakaŋaʡaj no~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ tamɬ~ɮaw maɾaɾənaj ko~u sakaira, nika so~uʡaɾinən ko~u niɬ~ɮəmakan ʦaaj aʦa ka matira. *pifaɾiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan o~u "təiko~uko~u~u-ka (paɾafinawɾan)" (****-****) a taɬ~ɮamanaj saɾo~uŋan, o~u sakafijo~uɾ taŋasa anini ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. o~u ŋaŋan no~u miso~u ʦaaj ko~u taɬ~ɮaŋaŋan i piʦaɾap no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajwan ira ko~u masasiro~umaaj a paɾəkapo~ut a pisatao~uʡ, tinako~u to~u ħo~unɬ~ɮo~u kako~u~uʦo~u so~u~uki (****-**** miħəʦaan), pako~u pinajaran to~u nəŋnəŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajwan, sakaəʦaaw ka pisətək no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan to~u niʦaɾapan a səra sanaj. *i **** miħəʦa maɾəɬ~ɮəf no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miʦaɾap ko~u ʦo~uŋko~u itija, o~uja miʦaapaj a ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ sifo~u o~u mamiɾaħəʦi mipaɾəkapo~ut a pisatao~uʡ to~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw, saka ɾaɾo~umaʡanto~u ato~u papo~utaɾajto~u maəmin a "maɾa o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw", o~uja ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj miʦikəro~uħ to~u "təiko~uko~u~u-ka (paɾafinawɾan)" a pisatao~uʡ. **o~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u pisatao~uʡ ħaɾo~u pitənaʡ to~u kiki no~u tajwan, mifo~uʡo~ut paso~uwaɾ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u nijaħ, patərəp to~u nijaħ so~uwaɾ a paħo~uso~u (ɾaʦiw), miʦikəro~uħ mifaɾiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan, pataŋiʦ papitaʡo~uŋ to~u ʦinʦia , mifo~uʡo~ut mikiħatija to~u pafiɾo~uŋan. ***sataɬ~ɮamaanaj, i "pifaɾiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan" a o~unto~u, pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ saɾo~uŋan pipaɾəkapo~ut a satao~uʡ a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~uja pitəiko~uko~u~u-ka (paɾafinawɾan) a paħapinaŋan. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u kaiɾisinan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ itija ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tajwan so~uto~uko~u~ufo~u~u miħapiw to~u pisaɾo~uf to~u kaʦiŋaŋan no~u kika, mitəka taɾaʡajaw mifaɾiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan a satao~uʡ, nano~ujaan mitəka to~u ko~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw "mifaɾiʦ to~u ŋaŋan" a o~unto~u itija. ****nika saʡajaw ʦaaj ko~u raħo~uɬ~ɮajaj a piɬ~ɮəmak to~u pifaɾiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan, pifaɾiʦ to~u ŋaŋan masaʡəɬ~ɮəmən ko~u pito~umaɬ~ɮaw, o~urasaka awaaj ko~u maŋaɾajaj mifaɾiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋanaw a tamɬ~ɮaw; saka "mipano~uno~uʡaj" ko~u miʦaɾapaj sifo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, saka ŋaɾaj no~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw misawaɬ~ɮ to~u ŋaŋan no~u nijaħ, mitakəʦ to~u "ko~utəi no~u ʦo~uai" sanaj. *****maɾaɾifət ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u ʦo~uŋko~u itija, kaʦaŋo~uʡo~utan ko~u kaɾo~uɬ~ɮafo~uɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, o~u miʦaɾapaj a sifo~u miħapiw itija: "o~u maŋaɾajaj mifaɾiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan a tamɬ~ɮaw i, maparo~uʦək mapato~uŋaɾ ko~u kaso~uj, fəɾaʦ o~uɬ~ɮaħ a kakaənən." ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u kiʦaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u sapiso~uɾo~ut, o~u wawa maŋaʡaj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a mikiwiko~u a "kaŋaʡajan", o~u sakaŋaʡaj no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj mipiɾiʡ mifaɾiʦ to~u sakaʦiŋaŋan. paɾa o~u ko~utəi a finawɾan *maɾaɾifət maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u i kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan itija, mikiħatija ko~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika i, mato~u ʦaaj to~u kaəɬ~ɮəŋ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a sifo~u; i **** miħəʦa, o~u so~uto~uko~u~ufo~u~u no~u tajwan misaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ to~u kaɾifo~utan pifaɾiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u finawɾan no~u tajwan kao~u ʦiiraaj to~u "maŋaɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u ko~utəi a ħaratəŋ" sato~u. **nano~uja, o~u pisatao~uʡ nano~u o~u mipano~uno~uʡaj mafaɾiʦ o~u nipataŋiʦan to~u. tinako~u: o~uja mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a sito~u o~uja ʦiŋaŋanaj to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ŋaŋan ta maŋaʡaj mitiɾiɬ~ɮ, to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ o~u ŋaŋan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ka pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, maɾatapaŋaj a ko~umo~ujin no~u tajwan, ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj miəsəs pato~umaɬ~ɮawaj, maəmin a mafaɾiʦ ko~u kaʦiŋaŋan. ***matini ko~u piʦəriŋ i, nika ira to~u ko~u miɾijaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw, itira i pifaɬ~ɮəs to~u miɾijaŋaj ato~u miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj, mipiɾiʡ to~u ʦaajaj kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ a ɾaɾan; o~uja ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ŋaŋan ato~u no~u nijaħ ɾakakawa a to~uʡasan paɾəkapo~ut ħananaj to~u, maŋaɾəf tastas ħan to~u ŋaŋan maɾafaʡəɾo~uħaj ŋaŋan no~u nijaħ. ****tinako~u: ħo~u~uaŋ faɾiʦ ħan paɾa "ħiro~uta to~uka" ano~u əʦa "jo~uko~ujama to~uka" ħan, ɾo~u~u faɾiʦ ħan paɾa "mijasita" ħan to~u, rama sato~u miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u nijaħ tato~uʡasan a ŋaŋan, tinako~u o~u ʦai faɾiʦən paɾa "watajo~u", o~u wo~u~u faɾiʦən paɾa "ənrjo~u" ħan to~u. *****o~uno~u jinʦo~u~umin i, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u piɾajap to~u nipaɬ~ɮamso~uan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a sifo~u ko~u sakaʦiŋaŋan, awaaj ko~u nijaħ to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a mipiɾiʡ to~u sakaʦiŋaŋan. iko~ur no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miʦaɾap, mitija to~u ko~u piʦaɾap no~u ko~umintaŋ *iko~ur i mamo~uko~uʡaj miħəʦaan, mapiɬ~ɮaħ ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u tajpinjaŋ, taŋso~uɾ sa "maʦaɾap maʦəfis" no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u sifo~u ko~u tajwan, nano~uja o~u kaʦiŋaŋan no~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw mafaɾiʦ paɾa no~u ħan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. **ŋəŋəŋən matija o~u patiko~uaj to~u no~u ħan a kaʦiŋaŋan, ħaɾo~u ŋaŋan no~u ɾaɾan saħəto~u o~uno~u ko~uwapiŋ ko~u paŋaŋan no~u ko~umintaŋ, matija to~u o~u piʦaɾap no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. o~uja miʡiŋtəɾaj to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u ko~umintaŋ a sifo~u, saki paɾa o~u ko~utəi to~u finawɾan wata ko~u nikaɾatiiħ to~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw, misiikəɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan taɬ~ɮaw ato~u ko~uwapiŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u paɾisafa kaɾako~umo~uiŋ to~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw. ***ano~u saki jinʦo~u~umin a nəŋnəŋ, o~u faʡəɾo~uħaj miʦaɾapaj k sako~uwan no~u ko~umintaŋ saan, ʦaaj piħaratəŋ to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin, pakinaɾi pataŋiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan ano~u əʦa o~u awaajaj ko~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan no~u to~uʡas ko~u pipakafit to~u ŋaŋan. ****masamatira wataaj to~u ko~u kaəpəʦ to~u po~unka no~u tajwan finaʦaɬ~ɮan piʦaɾap pataŋiʦ no~u papo~utaɾaj po~unka, miko~uraʦ ko~u "no~u nijaħan", nano~ujaan sa maɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u no~unijaħ ɾamit no~u po~unka no~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw. *****iʡajaw no~u nipatatəko~uan no~u tajwan i, o~u pipataŋiʦ sako~uwan no~u ko~umintaŋ papiɾajap to~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u maŋaħaj a ʦo~uŋko~u, miəpəʦaj to~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u tajwan, saka masasifo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ħəratəŋ no~u nijaħ to~u parətatəŋa to~u nijaħ ko~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw. ******anini sato~u, itiniaj i ʦaajaj ko~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj kitakit ko~u kaʡo~urip no~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u nianan ko~u sasaʡiʦəɾən pakajni i kaʦiŋaŋan, misaɾo~uf paħapinaŋ mikəto~un o~u ʦima ko~u nijaħ aħan. ******paɬ~ɮamso~uaj: sin taiwan ħəpiŋ kikiŋkaj a ʦo~u~uanjiən
S.FORM: == O pisitapang no micalapay sifo no Dipong mifalic to kacingangan no Taywan tamdaw == I 1940 miheca 2 folad 11 romi'ad kailisinan no Dipong itiya romi'ad, Taywan sotokufu o sapilaheciaw to pahecian to "palekapot a pisatao'", patodong sa i 2 folad 11 roi'ad i "Sinmu tenno" patirengan a romi'ad, pacering mihayda to pifalic kacingangan to no Dipong a ngangan no Taywan a tamdaw, patodong to sakanga'ay no Taywan tamdaw ato Dipong tamdaw malalenay ko sakaira, nika so'alinen ko nidemakan caay aca ka matira. ​Pifalic to kacingangan o "Teikoku-ka (palafinawlan)" (1937-1945) a tadamanay salongan, o sakafiyol tangasa anini romi'ad. O ngangan no miso caay ko tadangangan I picalap no Dipong to Taywan ira ko masasiromaay a palekapot a pisatao', tinako to Hondo kakuco suki (1919-1937 mihecaan), pako pinayaran to nengneng no Dipong to Taywan, sakaecaaw ka pisetek no finacadan to nicalapan a sera sanay. ​I 1937 miheca maledef no Dipong micalap ko Congko itiya, oya micaapay a Dipong sifo o mamilaheci mipalekapot a pisatao' to Taywan a tamdaw, saka laloma'anto ato papotalayto maemin a "mala o Dipong a tamdaw", oya citodongay micikeroh to "Teikoku-ka (palafinawlan)" a pisatao'. ​​O laloma'an no pisatao' halo pitena' to kiki no Taywan, mifo'ot pasowal to sowal no niyah, paterep to niyah sowal a pahoso (laciw), micikeroh mifalic to kacingangan, patangic papita'ong to cincia , mifo'ot mikihatiya to pafilongan. ​​​Satadamaanay, i "pifalic to kacingangan" a onto, patodong salongan pipalekapot a satao' a demak, oya piteikoku-ka (palafinawlan) a pahapinangan. I 1940 miheca 2 folad 11 romi'ad, o kailisinan no Dipong itiya romi'ad, Taywan sotokufu mihapiw to pisalof to kacingangan no kika, miteka tala'ayaw mifalic to kacingangan a satao', nanoyaan miteka to ko Taywan tamdaw "mifalic to ngangan" a onto itiya. ​​​​Nika sa'ayaw caay ko rahodayay a pidemak to pifalic to kacingangan, pifalic to ngangan masa'edemen ko pitomadaw, orasaka awaay ko mangalayay mifalic to kacinganganaw a tamdaw; saka "mipanono'ay" ko micalapay sifo no Dipong, saka ngalay no Taywan tamdaw misawad to ngangan no niyah, mitakec to "Kotei no coai" sanay. ​​​​​Malalifet ko lalood no Dipong ato Congko itiya, kacango'otan ko kalodafodafong, o micalapay a sifo mihapiw itiya: "O mangalayay mifalic to kacingangan a tamdaw i, maparocek mapatongal ko kasoy, felac odah a kakaenen." dengan o kicay no Dipong ko sapisolot, o wawa manga'ay micomod to pitilidan no Dipong a mikiwiko a "kanga'ayan", o sakanga'ay no 'alomanay mipili' mifalic to sakacingangan. Pala o Kotei a finawlan ​Malalifet malalood ko i kalaloodan itiya, mikihatiya ko sofitay no Amilika i, mato caay to kaedeng ko sofitay no Dipong a sifo; I 1943 miheca, o sotokufu no Taywan misadadahal to kalifotan pifalic to kacingangan, milongoc to finawlan no Taywan kao ciiraay to "mangadoay to Kotei a harateng" sato. ​​Nanoya, o pisatao' nano o mipanono'ay mafalic o nipatangican to. Tinako: oya mitiliday a sito oya cinganganay to no Dipong a ngangan ta manga'ay mitilid, to romi'ami'ad o ngangan no Dipong ka pitahidang, malatapangay a komoyin no Taywan, ko citodongay mieses patomadaway, maemin a mafalic ko kacingangan. ​​​Matini ko picering i, nika ira to ko miliyangay tamdaw, itira i pifades to miliyangay ato midoedoay, mipili' to caayay kalecad a lalan; oya Dipong a ngangan ato no niyah lakakawa a to'asan palekapot hananay to, mangalef tastas han to ngangan malafa'elohay ngangan no niyah. ​​​​Tinako: Huang falic han pala "Hirota Toka" ano eca "Yokoyama Toka" han, Lu falic han pala "Miyasita" han to, rama sato midotoc to niyah tato'asan a ngangan, tinako o Cai falicen pala "Watayo", o Wu falicen pala "Enryo" han to. ​​​​​Ono yincumin i, dengan o pilayap to nipadamsoan no Dipong a sifo ko sakacingangan, awaay ko niyah todong a mipili' to sakacingangan. Ikor no Dipong a micalap, mitiya to ko picalap no Komintang ​Ikor i mamoko'ay mihecaan, mapidah ko Dipong i kalalood no Taypinyang, tangsol sa "macalap macefis" no Conghuaminko sifo ko Taywan, nanoya o kacingangan no Taywan a tamdaw mafalic pala no Han a tilid. ​​Ngengengen matiya o patikoay to no Han a kacingangan, halo ngangan no lalan saheto ono kowaping ko pangangan no komintang, matiya to o picalap no Dipong. Oya mi'ingtelay to Dipong ko komintang a sifo, saki Pala o Kotei to finawlan wata ko nikalatiih to Taywan a tamdaw, misiiked to Taywan tadaw ato kowaping a tamdaw, dengan o palisafa kalakomoing to Taywan tamdaw. ​​​Ano saki yincumin a nengneng, o fa'elohay micalapay k sakowan no komintang saan, caay piharateng to faloco' no yincumin, pakinali patangic to kacingangan ano eca o awaayay ko kacitodongan no to'as ko pipakafit to ngangan. ​​​​Masamatira wataay to ko kaepec to ponka no Taywan finacadan picalap patangic no papotalay ponka, mikorac ko "no niyahan", nanoyaan sa malasawad ko noniyah lamit no ponka no Taywan a tamdaw. ​​​​​I'ayaw no nipatatekoan no Taywan i, o pipatangic sakowan no komintang papilayap to Taywan a tamdaw to mangahay a Congko, miepecay to kacitodong no Taywan, saka masasifod to herateng no niyah to paretatenga to niyah ko Taywan a tamdaw. ​​​​​​Anini sato, itiniay i caayay ko matatodongay kitakit ko ka'orip no Taywan a tamdaw, o nianan ko sasa'icelen pakayni i kacingangan, misalof pahapinang miketon o cima ko niyah ahan. ​​​​​​Padamsoay: Sin taiwan heping kikingkay a cuanyien
S.PHON: == o~u pisitapaŋ no~u miʦaɾapaj sifo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ mifaɾiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan no~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw == i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ kaiɾisinan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ itija ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tajwan so~uto~uko~u~ufo~u~u o~u sapiɾaħəʦiaw to~u paħəʦian to~u "paɾəkapo~ut a pisatao~uʡ", pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ sa i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~uiʡaɬ~ɮ i "sinmo~u~u tənno~u" patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, paʦəriŋ miħajɬ~ɮa to~u pifaɾiʦ kaʦiŋaŋan to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ŋaŋan no~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw, pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u sakaŋaʡaj no~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ tamɬ~ɮaw maɾaɾənaj ko~u sakaira, nika so~uʡaɾinən ko~u niɬ~ɮəmakan ʦaaj aʦa ka matira. *pifaɾiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan o~u "təiko~uko~u~u-ka (paɾafinawɾan)" (****-****) a taɬ~ɮamanaj saɾo~uŋan, o~u sakafijo~uɾ taŋasa anini ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. o~u ŋaŋan no~u miso~u ʦaaj ko~u taɬ~ɮaŋaŋan i piʦaɾap no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajwan ira ko~u masasiro~umaaj a paɾəkapo~ut a pisatao~uʡ, tinako~u to~u ħo~unɬ~ɮo~u kako~u~uʦo~u so~u~uki (****-**** miħəʦaan), pako~u pinajaran to~u nəŋnəŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajwan, sakaəʦaaw ka pisətək no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan to~u niʦaɾapan a səra sanaj. *i **** miħəʦa maɾəɬ~ɮəf no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miʦaɾap ko~u ʦo~uŋko~u itija, o~uja miʦaapaj a ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ sifo~u o~u mamiɾaħəʦi mipaɾəkapo~ut a pisatao~uʡ to~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw, saka ɾaɾo~umaʡanto~u ato~u papo~utaɾajto~u maəmin a "maɾa o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw", o~uja ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj miʦikəro~uħ to~u "təiko~uko~u~u-ka (paɾafinawɾan)" a pisatao~uʡ. **o~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u pisatao~uʡ ħaɾo~u pitənaʡ to~u kiki no~u tajwan, mifo~uʡo~ut paso~uwaɾ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u nijaħ, patərəp to~u nijaħ so~uwaɾ a paħo~uso~u (ɾaʦiw), miʦikəro~uħ mifaɾiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan, pataŋiʦ papitaʡo~uŋ to~u ʦinʦia , mifo~uʡo~ut mikiħatija to~u pafiɾo~uŋan. ***sataɬ~ɮamaanaj, i "pifaɾiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan" a o~unto~u, pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ saɾo~uŋan pipaɾəkapo~ut a satao~uʡ a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~uja pitəiko~uko~u~u-ka (paɾafinawɾan) a paħapinaŋan. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u kaiɾisinan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ itija ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tajwan so~uto~uko~u~ufo~u~u miħapiw to~u pisaɾo~uf to~u kaʦiŋaŋan no~u kika, mitəka taɾaʡajaw mifaɾiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan a satao~uʡ, nano~ujaan mitəka to~u ko~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw "mifaɾiʦ to~u ŋaŋan" a o~unto~u itija. ****nika saʡajaw ʦaaj ko~u raħo~uɬ~ɮajaj a piɬ~ɮəmak to~u pifaɾiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan, pifaɾiʦ to~u ŋaŋan masaʡəɬ~ɮəmən ko~u pito~umaɬ~ɮaw, o~urasaka awaaj ko~u maŋaɾajaj mifaɾiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋanaw a tamɬ~ɮaw; saka "mipano~uno~uʡaj" ko~u miʦaɾapaj sifo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, saka ŋaɾaj no~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw misawaɬ~ɮ to~u ŋaŋan no~u nijaħ, mitakəʦ to~u "ko~utəi no~u ʦo~uai" sanaj. *****maɾaɾifət ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u ʦo~uŋko~u itija, kaʦaŋo~uʡo~utan ko~u kaɾo~uɬ~ɮafo~uɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, o~u miʦaɾapaj a sifo~u miħapiw itija: "o~u maŋaɾajaj mifaɾiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan a tamɬ~ɮaw i, maparo~uʦək mapato~uŋaɾ ko~u kaso~uj, fəɾaʦ o~uɬ~ɮaħ a kakaənən." ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u kiʦaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u sapiso~uɾo~ut, o~u wawa maŋaʡaj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a mikiwiko~u a "kaŋaʡajan", o~u sakaŋaʡaj no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj mipiɾiʡ mifaɾiʦ to~u sakaʦiŋaŋan. paɾa o~u ko~utəi a finawɾan *maɾaɾifət maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u i kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan itija, mikiħatija ko~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika i, mato~u ʦaaj to~u kaəɬ~ɮəŋ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a sifo~u; i **** miħəʦa, o~u so~uto~uko~u~ufo~u~u no~u tajwan misaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ to~u kaɾifo~utan pifaɾiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u finawɾan no~u tajwan kao~u ʦiiraaj to~u "maŋaɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u ko~utəi a ħaratəŋ" sato~u. **nano~uja, o~u pisatao~uʡ nano~u o~u mipano~uno~uʡaj mafaɾiʦ o~u nipataŋiʦan to~u. tinako~u: o~uja mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a sito~u o~uja ʦiŋaŋanaj to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ŋaŋan ta maŋaʡaj mitiɾiɬ~ɮ, to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ o~u ŋaŋan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ka pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, maɾatapaŋaj a ko~umo~ujin no~u tajwan, ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj miəsəs pato~umaɬ~ɮawaj, maəmin a mafaɾiʦ ko~u kaʦiŋaŋan. ***matini ko~u piʦəriŋ i, nika ira to~u ko~u miɾijaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw, itira i pifaɬ~ɮəs to~u miɾijaŋaj ato~u miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj, mipiɾiʡ to~u ʦaajaj kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ a ɾaɾan; o~uja ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ŋaŋan ato~u no~u nijaħ ɾakakawa a to~uʡasan paɾəkapo~ut ħananaj to~u, maŋaɾəf tastas ħan to~u ŋaŋan maɾafaʡəɾo~uħaj ŋaŋan no~u nijaħ. ****tinako~u: ħo~u~uaŋ faɾiʦ ħan paɾa "ħiro~uta to~uka" ano~u əʦa "jo~uko~ujama to~uka" ħan, ɾo~u~u faɾiʦ ħan paɾa "mijasita" ħan to~u, rama sato~u miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u nijaħ tato~uʡasan a ŋaŋan, tinako~u o~u ʦai faɾiʦən paɾa "watajo~u", o~u wo~u~u faɾiʦən paɾa "ənrjo~u" ħan to~u. *****o~uno~u jinʦo~u~umin i, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u piɾajap to~u nipaɬ~ɮamso~uan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a sifo~u ko~u sakaʦiŋaŋan, awaaj ko~u nijaħ to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a mipiɾiʡ to~u sakaʦiŋaŋan. iko~ur no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miʦaɾap, mitija to~u ko~u piʦaɾap no~u ko~umintaŋ *iko~ur i mamo~uko~uʡaj miħəʦaan, mapiɬ~ɮaħ ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u tajpinjaŋ, taŋso~uɾ sa "maʦaɾap maʦəfis" no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u sifo~u ko~u tajwan, nano~uja o~u kaʦiŋaŋan no~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw mafaɾiʦ paɾa no~u ħan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. **ŋəŋəŋən matija o~u patiko~uaj to~u no~u ħan a kaʦiŋaŋan, ħaɾo~u ŋaŋan no~u ɾaɾan saħəto~u o~uno~u ko~uwapiŋ ko~u paŋaŋan no~u ko~umintaŋ, matija to~u o~u piʦaɾap no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. o~uja miʡiŋtəɾaj to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u ko~umintaŋ a sifo~u, saki paɾa o~u ko~utəi to~u finawɾan wata ko~u nikaɾatiiħ to~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw, misiikəɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan taɬ~ɮaw ato~u ko~uwapiŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u paɾisafa kaɾako~umo~uiŋ to~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw. ***ano~u saki jinʦo~u~umin a nəŋnəŋ, o~u faʡəɾo~uħaj miʦaɾapaj k sako~uwan no~u ko~umintaŋ saan, ʦaaj piħaratəŋ to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin, pakinaɾi pataŋiʦ to~u kaʦiŋaŋan ano~u əʦa o~u awaajaj ko~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan no~u to~uʡas ko~u pipakafit to~u ŋaŋan. ****masamatira wataaj to~u ko~u kaəpəʦ to~u po~unka no~u tajwan finaʦaɬ~ɮan piʦaɾap pataŋiʦ no~u papo~utaɾaj po~unka, miko~uraʦ ko~u "no~u nijaħan", nano~ujaan sa maɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u no~unijaħ ɾamit no~u po~unka no~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw. *****iʡajaw no~u nipatatəko~uan no~u tajwan i, o~u pipataŋiʦ sako~uwan no~u ko~umintaŋ papiɾajap to~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u maŋaħaj a ʦo~uŋko~u, miəpəʦaj to~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u tajwan, saka masasifo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ħəratəŋ no~u nijaħ to~u parətatəŋa to~u nijaħ ko~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw. ******anini sato~u, itiniaj i ʦaajaj ko~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj kitakit ko~u kaʡo~urip no~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u nianan ko~u sasaʡiʦəɾən pakajni i kaʦiŋaŋan, misaɾo~uf paħapinaŋ mikəto~un o~u ʦima ko~u nijaħ aħan. ******paɬ~ɮamso~uaj: sin taiwan ħəpiŋ kikiŋkaj a ʦo~u~uanjiən
